data.change_summary: Updated `src/adapters/process_backend.rs` so `PreparedCommand` tracks non-zero-exit failures, `cleanup()` skips deletion once a failure is recorded, Codex schema/last-message files are moved from `runtime/temp` to `runtime/failed`, and combined stdout/stderr is written to `runtime/failed/<invocation_id>.failed.raw`. The non-zero-exit branches in `invoke()` now preserve those artifacts before returning errors, including the stale-session retry path. Added unit coverage in `tests/unit/process_backend_test.rs` for preserved Codex artifacts and failed raw-output capture.

steps.description: Inspect the existing process backend cleanup and non-zero-exit handling paths to find where temp files were deleted and where failure artifacts needed to be preserved.
Implement failure-state tracking on prepared commands, preserve non-zero-exit artifacts under `runtime/failed`, and update `invoke()` error paths to call the new preservation flow before cleanup.
Add unit tests for Codex failed-artifact preservation and Claude/Codex failed raw-output capture, then validate with formatting and targeted Rust tests.

validation_evidence: `nix develop -c cargo test --features test-stub process_backend -- --nocapture` passed, including 15 `src/adapters/process_backend.rs` tests and 37 `tests/unit/process_backend_test.rs` tests.
`nix develop -c cargo fmt --check` passed after formatting the updated files.
New tests cover Codex non-zero exits moving `*.schema.json` and `*.last-message.json` into `runtime/failed` and writing `*.failed.raw`, plus Claude non-zero exits writing `*.failed.raw`.
